chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No.D- 373 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with Signature of Judge For non-prosecution 15.10.2025 None present for the Petitioners nor any intimation is received. The petitioners by filing instant Petition are seeking their appointment in the Education and Literacy Department, Government of Sindh, on different posts for the process initiated in the year, 2012, whereas, they have filed instant Petition in the year, 2023. No plausible explanation has been furnished for such a delay in approaching this Court. This petition being hit by doctrine of laches is hereby dismissed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
